top_signals.title: Oil prices jump after Iran missiles threaten fragile ceasefire

top_signals.title: Services industry falters as activity plummets amid Iran conflict fallout
top_signals.summary: The UK’s services sector’s economic activity and performance declined sharply last month as fallout from the Iran conflict continues to impact businesses, according to new figures. According to data on the latest business trends from accountancy and advisory firm BDO, a drop in sales and fragile client confidence led to a drop in the services [...]
